faqs.question: What is the AI Call Center Agent service?
faqs.answer: It handles call routing via voice AI, provides scripted support flows, qualifies leads, and logs call summaries.

faqs.question: Who is AI Call Center Agent built for?
faqs.answer: It is specifically built for Qatar startups and SMEs looking to automate their daily operations.

faqs.question: How long does implementation take?
faqs.answer: Implementation typically takes 1 to 2 weeks, including on-site setup in Doha if required.

faqs.question: What are the deliverables?
faqs.answer: You will receive a complete, ready-to-use AI Call Center Agent system configured to your specific business needs.

faqs.question: What support is included?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive training for your team and ongoing maintenance to ensure optimal performance.

faqs.question: What is the pricing model?
faqs.answer: Pricing is dependent on your exact scope and requirements. Please book a free consultation for a detailed quote.
